description.zh-Hans: 生成岩浆/熔岩辉光图案，具有暗色地壳、发光的次表层纹理（Voronoi边缘）和热辐射效果。
description.en: Generates magma / lava glow patterns with dark crust, glowing subsurface veins (Voronoi edges), and heat emission.

triggers.zh-Hans: 岩浆, 熔岩, 地壳, 火山, 发光纹理
triggers.en: magma, lava, crust, volcanic, glow, thermal

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成岩浆/熔岩辉光纹理，带暗色地壳和发光次表层脉络，适用于火山地形。
exampleUsage.en: Generates magma/lava glow texture with dark crust and glowing subsurface veins for volcanic terrain.
